creator: michael.krauss@gmx.de
text:
Found jdk-6u15-linux-i586.bin in Suns Java archive. So I can install
the port now.

But the error with the missing lib still remains:
[mickraus@gandalf ~]\$ java -v                                       
/usr/local/linux-sun-jdk1.6.0/bin/java: error while loading shared
libraries: libjli.so: cannot open shared object file: No such file or
directory


Kind regards,
Michael Krauss
